name: Rutabaga Pudding (Irish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean, peel and cube the rutabaga.
2. Cook in boiling water until tender, then drain.
3. Mash thoroughly.
4. Add all the other ingredients to the mashed rutabaga.
5. Pour into a 2-quart casserole dish.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
7. A pinch of cinnamon or ginger might be added.
